title: PlumpisCraft
description: A kitchen sink modpack that explores RPG elements without sacrificing access to technology and automation.
body:
# PlumpisCraft

Welcome to PlumpisCraft, a kitchen sink mod aiming to support adventurers and tinkerers alike! This modpack was developed for players to just have fun, explore, catch cobblemon, make cool machines with create, and fight bosses! It has an expansive skill tree for you to become incredibly overpowered, various configuration changes to make progression a bit more fun, and plenty of intermod integration. If you want to play a modpack that uses some of the best and brightest mods from a modern version of minecraft, then PlumpisCraft is for you! 

#### Requirements:
We recommend 6gb of RAM and a modern CPU/GPU.

## Key Features

### Quests / Ponders
This will come in a future update, and will server as a way to help players learn new mods!

### Exploration
#### Aether
It's back! If you don't know the Aether mod, maybe this pack isn't for you... Just kidding! Make yourself a glowstone portal and take to the skies in this fun and rewarding mod!
#### Alex's Caves
New cave types with plenty of enemies to fight and utilities to get!
#### Aquamirae
Overhauled snow biomes with new bosses to fight and rewards to get!
#### Terralith
Completely overhauled world gen! Integrates with Cobblemon!
#### Lootr
Player based loot! Don't worry about taking it all, your friends will have some too!
#### Nature's and Explorer's Compass
Quickly locate biomes and structures!
#### Waystones
Find waystones spread across your world to allow for quick travelling!
#### When Dungeons Arise
Find massive dungeons with difficulty enemies to fight and loot to be had!
#### Xaero's Mods
Use the minimap and world map provided to explore your world! An integrated resource pack will allow you to see new Cobblemon from your map as you travel!

### Technology
#### Create
Make awesome looking machines! There are tons of integration and improvement mods added to make the create experience amazing!
#### Mekanism
A staple in the modded world, energize everything!
#### Flux Networks
Allows you to handle all your energy network needs!
#### Thermal Mods
To fill in all the holes!
#### Refined Storage
Allows you to handle all your item network needs!

### Magic
#### Iron Spells n' Spellbooks
Have fun casting spells!
#### Mystical Agriculture
Some say its a tech mod, but it feels pretty magical! Automate all your resources!

### Plenty more!
We have a plethora of performance enhancing mods and inventory tweaks to make your experience so much better!
